title: Bryomorphe zeyheri
intro: Bryomorphe zeyheri, also known as the "Erect Stinkwood", is a species of shrub or small tree in the family Annonaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in South African medicine, offering various health benefits, including its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The bioactive constituents of Bryomorphe zeyheri include annonaceous acetogenins, which have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory and antiproliferative properties. Traditionally, the plant is used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments in traditional medicine.
